full_prompt: Design a 3U CubeSat primary structure benchmark compliant with Cal Poly CubeSat Design Specification (CDS) Rev 14 for 3U deployers. The structure is a monolithic 6061-T6 aluminum skeletonized chassis with external envelope 100.0 +/- 0.1 mm x 100.0 +/- 0.1 mm x 340.5 +/- 0.3 mm (stacked 3U), four deployer rails on the long corners (8.5 x 8.5 mm rails, at least 85% of each 340.5 mm long rail in contact with the P-POD), and a total mass at or below 4.0 kg (3 x 1.33 kg) per CDS Rev 14 3U mass cap. The structure must support internal electronics stacks using the standard PC/104 form factor (90 x 96 mm boards, 4 mounting holes at 85.60 x 82.55 mm), spaced up to 12 boards along the long axis. Loads per GEVS-SE GSFC-STD-7000 typical qualification levels for a secondary payload on a launcher like Falcon 9 / Vega / PSLV: (LC1) quasi-static 12 g axial + 7 g lateral simultaneously, (LC2) sine vibration 2.5 g at 5-100 Hz, (LC3) random vibration GRMS 14.1 at 20-2000 Hz, (LC4) shock response 1000 g peak 100-10000 Hz. Material 6061-T6 (yield 276 MPa, ultimate 310 MPa, E 69 GPa, density 2700 kg/m^3). Pass/fail: (R1) quasi-static max von Mises stress must not exceed 137 MPa (yield / SF 2.0 per NASA-STD-5001B Category A bracket), (R2) first natural frequency must be at least 100 Hz to clear the launcher primary interface per ECSS-E-HB-32-26A, (R3) total structure mass at or below 4.0 kg, (R4) a linear buckling analysis under 12 g axial + 7 g lateral must yield a first-mode load factor of at least 2.0, and (R5) deployer rail flatness tolerance must be +/- 0.1 mm along the 340.5 mm rail length. Vibration analysis (modal + random) is required for R2. Thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver a STEP AP242 solid body plus a structural report with max von Mises, first natural frequency, total mass, first buckling load factor, and rail flatness.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic 3U CubeSat primary structure to Cal Poly CubeSat Design Specification Rev 14 for 3U deployers. Envelope 100 x 100 x 340.5 mm (+/-0.1 / +/-0.1 / +/-0.3 mm), four 8.5 x 8.5 mm deployer rails on the long corners with at least 85% contact along the 340.5 mm length, total mass at or below 4.0 kg. Internal PC/104 stack of up to 12 boards along the long axis. Structure is 6061-T6 aluminum. Structure is constrained in the P-POD by the four rails.

Qualification loads per GEVS-SE GSFC-STD-7000 (typical secondary-payload levels on a Falcon 9 / Vega / PSLV-class launcher) with a NASA-STD-5001B Category A SF of 2.0 on the quasi-static case.

Load cases.
- LC1 quasi-static: 12 g axial + 7 g lateral simultaneously.
- LC2 sine vibration: 2.5 g, 5-100 Hz.
- LC3 random vibration: 14.1 GRMS, 20-2000 Hz.
- LC4 shock: 1000 g peak, 100-10000 Hz.

First natural frequency must clear the launcher primary-interface band (>=100 Hz), and deployer-rail flatness must remain within +/-0.1 mm.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: CDS Rev 14 envelope/rail/mass compliance is a rule-checklist on the geometry, not FEA.

prompt.title: CDS Rev 14 3U CubeSat primary structure
prompt.brief: Design a 6061-T6 monolithic 3U CubeSat chassis (100 x 100 x 340.5 mm, <=4.0 kg) compliant with Cal Poly CDS Rev 14, passing GEVS quasi-static, modal >=100 Hz, and 2x buckling margin.

boundary_conditions.deployer_rails: constrained in P-POD by 4 rails with 85% contact

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Al 6061-T6 yield 276 / SF 2.0 per NASA-STD-5001B Category A
Cal Poly CDS Rev 14 rail tolerance

exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Structure-only submission; thermal is a separate subsystem.

eval_coverage: CDS Rev 14 envelope + rail + mass compliance
